creator: leeym@leeym.com
text:
Hi, Dereckson,

Installing files in /usr/share will make this port no longer PREFIX-clean.

Since I don't use cmatrix for a long while, I don't want to make such 
changes.
Are you interested in maintaining this port? If yes, I'm glad to 
transfer the maintainership to you.

Regards,

-- 
Yen-Ming Lee
